documents.title: Backend Interview Notes
documents.raw_text: FastAPI interview preparation should cover dependency injection, request validation, SQL migrations, and Docker compose checks.

cases.query: What should FastAPI interview preparation cover?

documents.title: RAG Citation Notes
documents.raw_text: Grounded RAG answers should cite source snippets, mark uncertainty when evidence is missing, and avoid unsupported claims.

cases.query: How should grounded RAG answers handle evidence?

documents.title: Project Rewrite Guardrails
documents.raw_text: Project rewrite suggestions must preserve evidence, list forbidden changes, and avoid fabricating metrics or business impact.

cases.query: What should project rewrite suggestions avoid?

documents.title: Application Tracking Notes
documents.raw_text: Application tracking records should keep manual status history, reflection summaries, priority, and upcoming interview notes.

cases.query: What fields should application tracking keep?

documents.title: Study Gap Plan
documents.raw_text: A study gap plan should turn missing skills into tasks, resources, deliverables, and acceptance criteria before resume edits.

cases.query: How should a study gap plan handle missing skills?
